headlines.title: Britain unveils sweeping ban on social media for under-16s
headlines.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced a sweeping ban on social media use for those under 16, joining other countries around the world seeking to protect children online.

headlines.title: How old are you really? Inside Roblox’s new campaign to verify user ages
headlines.description: Roblox gave NBC News an exclusive look at the biometric age-checking tool that, starting this month, will be used to place the platform’s users into age-based accounts.

headlines.title: Bill aims to centralize government efforts to fight online fraud
headlines.description: A pair of senators plans to introduce a bill Monday that would centralize federal efforts to fight scams and help Americans obtain information about how to identify fraud.Sens.

headlines.title: Anthropic suspends new AI models after government directive
headlines.description: The U.S. government instructed Anthropic to prevent any foreign national from accessing the AI company’s latest and most powerful models Friday evening, according to the AI giant

headlines.title: Meet the regular people making money off SpaceX’s IPO — from a few bucks to a few million
headlines.description: The record-setting SpaceX IPO made Elon Musk a trillionaire. It also paid off for Daniella Rodriguez and millions of other retail investors who had stock.

headlines.title: SpaceX stock gains 19% its first trading day, closing out a historic IPO
headlines.description: SpaceX, the largest IPO to ever hit the public market, began trading and soared 30%, making Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire.

headlines.title: SpaceX locks in IPO price of $135, making it largest stock debut ever
headlines.description: The company controlled by Elon Musk will begin trading Friday at a valuation of $1.77 trillion.

headlines.title: Martin Scorsese’s promotion of AI company called a ‘betrayal’ by directors union
headlines.description: A letter from the Art Director’s Guild accused the acclaimed filmmaker of “turning his back” on the artists who helped him create some of his best work.

headlines.title: Anthropic releases Fable 5 model, built on the same tech that spooked the government
headlines.description: Anthropic released its latest model Tuesday afternoon, heralding the public’s first access to the AI company’s most powerful class of AI systems.

headlines.title: US and Iran Reach Framework Deal to End War, Reopen Hormuz
headlines.description: An agreement has been reached between the United States and Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to President Donald Trump and Iranian officials. A document signing is expected to take place Friday. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports on the details of the deal for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump to face European allies at odds with him over two wars at G7 summit
headlines.description: Trump will touch down in France for the G7 meeting with allies who are at odds with him over a pair of wars.

headlines.title: Crowd at UFC Freedom 250 sings ‘Happy Birthday’ to Trump
headlines.description: During UFC Freedom 250, the crowd sang “Happy Birthday” to President Donald Trump as the UFC hosted a fight card on the White House’s South Lawn.
